hero.description: We provide the best bus fleet with modern facilities, friendly service, and high safety standards. Every journey is designed to give you maximum comfort, making your travel experience more enjoyable and worry-free.

executive.description: An economical choice while still prioritizing comfort and travel safety.

additional.title: Additional Information
additional.content: New Shantika {bus} is equipped with {capacity} fully reclining seats to provide maximum comfort. Each seat has a USB charger port, personal entertainment screen, as well as clean blankets and pillows. Passengers also get safe snack box and free drinks during the trip. For safety, the bus is equipped with GPS Tracking and CCTV, as well as a spacious storage room for luggage. Estimated travel time Semarang - Jakarta is about 8 hours, making your trip more relaxed and enjoyable.

about.description: PO. New Shantika was founded in March 2003. The main garage is located in Ngabul, Jepara Regency, Central Java. New Shantika serves several routes such as Jepara-Jakarta with a fleet providing full facilities for passenger comfort.
